title: Records of Proceedings
content: The records of all proceedings before the OEA, which must be chronologically arranged and appropriately paginated, shall be summarized in writing by the OEA, including the substance of the evidence presented. The minutes of proceedings shall be signed by the parties and shall form part of the records. In case the parties refuse to sign, the refusal and reason/s given must be indicated by the OEA in the minutes.
